seo_title: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: Improved AI Speech Quality and Control
meta_description: Google's Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS offers improved speech quality and control, with audio tags for adjusting vocal style and pacing in over 70 languages.
body_html:
Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS is a new AI speech model with improved controllability, expressivity and quality.

  • Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS supports over 70 languages
  • The model uses SynthID watermarking to identify AI-generated audio
  • Developers can fine-tune voices and export settings for consistent use in Google AI Studio

Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS achieved an Elo score of 1,211 on the Artificial Analysis TTS leaderboard

Vocal Style Pacing
Adjustable using audio tags Controlled using natural language commands

  • The model has improved speech quality, making it sound more natural than previous versions
  • Audience can change how the AI talks by using special commands in the text
  • AI can speak in over 70 languages and adds a hidden watermark to the audio

The model is available for developers in preview via the Gemini API and Google AI Studio.

Read time: 7 minutes

source.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
source.summary: Our newest audio model introduces granular audio tags that give you precise control to direct AI speech for expressive audio generation.
